title: Keep Moving
author: Nicki Adelson
subtopics: resilience, healing, life transitions, moving forward
subline: On loss, transition, and the grace of forward motion.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A trail of FOOTPRINTS sweeping diagonally across the cover, from lower-left to upper-right. The first 6 are graphite, the last 2 are RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 0)" fill="none">
    <!-- 8 footprints, each ~60px wide, alternating left/right -->
    <g fill="#cccccc" stroke="none">
      <!-- Footprint 1 (lower left) -->
      <g transform="translate(180 1600) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(280 1480) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(420 1340) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(580 1180) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(760 1000) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(960 800) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="38"/>
        <circle cx="-12" cy="-44" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-2" cy="-50" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="10" cy="-46" r="5"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Footprints 7 and 8 — RED, the most recent, larger -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="none">
      <g transform="translate(1180 580) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="28" ry="48"/>
        <circle cx="-15" cy="-55" r="6"/>
        <circle cx="-3" cy="-62" r="6"/>
        <circle cx="12" cy="-58" r="6"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1420 340) rotate(-15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="32" ry="56"/>
        <circle cx="-17" cy="-64" r="7"/>
        <circle cx="-3" cy="-72" r="7"/>
        <circle cx="14" cy="-68" r="7"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- A faint arrow extending beyond the last footprint -->
    <line x1="1450" y1="280" x2="1600" y2="100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3 5"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Keep Moving = a trail of footprints. 8 footprints (shoe + 3 toe dots) sweep diagonally from lower-left to upper-right, the natural walking direction. The first 6 are graphite; the last 2 are RED and 30% larger — the 'current steps' (where the walker is now, where the energy is). A faint dashed red arrow extends beyond the last footprint into the unknown. Title sits in the center, weight 500 command, mixed-case (2-line stack). Brand 'FORWARD' in the bottom-right; pill '→ → →' at the bottom — the direction.
